channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bike lanes and speed cameras disappear from the DOT's list of proven safety measures
item.description: The Federal Highway Administration quietly removed bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key best-practices list, drawing criticism.

item.title: DHS pledged body cams for all immigration agents. Months later, that hasn't happened
item.description: Federal immigration agents recently fatally shot two immigrant fathers, and none of the officers involved were wearing body cameras.

item.title: 'Gossip' originally had divine roots. Here's how it became associated with sin.
item.description: Everyone has engaged in gossip, but its early meaning was linked to family and close relationships.

item.title: TrumpRx promised affordable drugs but delivered limited discounts
item.description: President Trump called TrumpRx a major healthcare breakthrough. However, an NPR analysis shows drugmakers are offering deals on only a few products.
